from __future__ import annotations

def branching_on_file_suffix_or_mode_string_scattered_across_codebase_positive(path: str):
    if path.endswith(".json"):
        return "json"
    if path.endswith(".yaml") or path.endswith(".yml"):
        return "yaml"
    if path.endswith(".toml"):
        return "toml"
    return "unknown"
